concerns.analysis: The output document suffers from a severe truncation. It completely omits pages 4 through 30 of the source document. This missing range includes the second half of the Executive Summary, the entirety of Section I (Purpose), Section II (Detailed Accomplishments), Section III (Action Plan), and Appendix B (Establishing Authority). The JSON explicitly includes a placeholder indicating that 28 sections were omitted.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Entire content from Page 4 (Executive Summary cont.) through Page 30 (Appendices list/Appendix B).

concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: The Executive Summary section is severely truncated. While the bulleted accomplishments from page 3 are present, the detailed narrative paragraphs summarizing key initiatives (NC OneMap, Orthoimagery, Seamless Parcels, Address NC, Street Centerlines, Census Collaboration, etc.) that appear on page 4 are entirely missing. This represents a loss of approximately 40% of the Executive Summary section's total content.

concerns.output_quote: The Executive Summary ends at element index 26 with content from page 3.
